evidence: standards/enterprise/swift-6-concurrency.md and the final joined AI consistency review
exception_policy: An @unchecked Sendable conformance is temporary and requires a documented synchronization invariant, accountable owner, expiry, and removal plan.
statement: Every value crossing an actor or task isolation boundary MUST be genuinely Sendable, copied into an immutable Sendable snapshot, or remain confined to its owning isolation domain.
